per_skill.name: roadmap-auto
per_skill.detail: templates/skills/roadmap-auto.md inserts a 48-emoji rainbow banner (line 7) + blank line (line 8) absent from live SKILL.md. Cosmetic; no semantic drift.

per_skill.name: roadmap-spec
per_skill.detail: templates/skills/roadmap-spec.md inserts the same 48-emoji rainbow banner (line 7) + blank line (line 8) absent from live SKILL.md. Cosmetic; no semantic drift.

live_skills_without_template_note: Out of scope for this node — templates/ is the roadmap-engine-owned subset (roadmap-* + threads). Other live skills are owned by their respective repos (fleet · stance · etc.) and shouldn't be templated here. Recorded for reference only.
auto_fix_intent: NONE — this node is a manifest. Drift fixes downstream per spec.
